121.content:
Harry was looking for help with a particularly difficult spell. After all, this year's exams would be crucial in deciding whether he possessed the skill, power, and dedication to become an Auror.

He checked the library first, always a safe bet for Hermione, but this time she wasn't there. She wasn't in the common room, either, and Harry was about to give up, when he recalled the Marauder's Map. Finding an empty table he laid it out, and set about scanning it for Hermione's name and location. Magic came a poor second to Google Maps in some respects Harry thought. The flexible nature of the castle architecture made the task even harder. But he finally spotted her, in alone in an isolated part of the castle. Watching for a short while he confirmed it was her. The marker wasn't moving, and he guessed she was lost in a good book... a good text book, probably.

It would take ten minutes to walk that far, but 'Mischief Managed', he refolded the map and tucked it away. He spotted Draco as he made his way through the castle, but Draco didn't spot him, so he avoided him.

As he climbed the last set of stairs, Harry was short of breath, as he approached his friend. His shoes made no noise as he spotted her. She was sitting with her back to the door, in the middle of the floor and from her gestures stirring a cauldron.

It was clear that she didn't know he was there. She was talking quietly to herself, he was very tempted to listen, but afraid that she'd say something she didn't want overheard.

So Harry weighed up his options, and decided to startle her.

Stopping about two feet from her back, he could smell the shampoo in her hair, and hear her humming a tune as she mixed the pink liquid in her cauldron. She carefully dipped a tiny potion phial into the mix and took a sample.

"Hermione." he said loudly, but without shouting.

She jumped out of her skin. Hermione thrashed about until she got her feet under her, then she whirled about to face Harry.

The cauldron rang, as her shoes clanged against it, her face was furious. Harry put on his best, 'It was only a joke' face, and raised his hands to signal his surrender.

It would be catastrophic, something that is completely unnecessary at the moment." Mcgonagle pleaded in her Scottish brogue. "She has to come out some time. The sooner the better." Snape seemingly crowed, with malice in his every word. Dumbledore, in his infinite wisdom, decided that until a cure was found, "Harry Potter" was to be in a unfortunate accident, and in the hospital wing until further notice. Any students except her close friends were to be diverted from her area at all costs. "I only hope that we find the cure." He sighed warily. He had heard reports that the Dark Lord was on the move again, and that it was only Harry Potter who could defeat him. Back at the hospital wing, Hermione was watching her body double eat dinner. It was the third plate, and by the time that the plate was nearly licked clean, she grabbed it and put it just outside the cordoned off area. "Ok, just stop it, it's like watching a pug eat slop! You need to cut that out before you start getting fat!" For emphasis, she poked her fingers into her double's belly, which had already grown soft. "Don't..." Harry began, but it was too late. A blast of air out her rear brought the conversation to a brief halt. "This is not over. We will get you in shape at some point!" Hermione bid Harry goodbye, which was fortunate, as Harry decided to break out some dessert after she left, falling asleep to the vision of Hermione telling her off in the morning.

Waking to the sound of shoe against stone, Har’minone slowly opened her eyes to see Ginny standing over her bed. This was quite a surprise, as Har’minone was sure that Madam Pomfrey would not allow visitors after hours.
Hello Harry, or... I guess Hermione now, right? It’s rather unfortunate what happened to you. How do you feel?”
“Like... absolute garbage. I was just in the wrong place at the wrong time, everyone thinks I’m stuck with some horrible ailment, my concentration is shot, and above all else I’m... I’m getting fat!” Har’minone whisper fiercely, shaking her pudgy gut for emphasis.
“You poor thing. That must be terrible for you. Here, let me see what I can do with you.”
The odd phrasing suddenly registered with Har’minone. With her? That was an awfully weird way to say that.
“Ginny, what exactly-” Any words that could have expressed Har’mione’s confusion were quickly silenced as Ginny crawled onto her bed, holding down her arms with her surprisingly muscled arms and vice-like grip. Har’minone attempted to move, (Making her soft chest and belly jiggle like mad in the process.)
“Ginny! What the hell? Why are you doing this?”
“Because I’ve always had a thing for chubbier girls. I wanted to be with Hermione, but she... she wasn't interested. But now you look like Hermione, and you just look too adorable to pass up. Don’t worry, no one going to interrupt this...”
Ginny placed a hand on Har’minone’s chest, tearing the fabric of her blouse in the process. Her soft, flabby tits shook even harder, causing Har’minone to moan softly. She always liked Ginny, ad if Ginny liked fatter girls, and she was now a fatter girl, who was he to argue with her? By this point, her robe had been taken off as well, leaving her in a far too tight pair of bra and panties than would normally be deemed respectable. Har’minone doubted anything about her would be left to the imagination after Ginny was finished.
Ginny seemed to only breathe in deeply. “This is so great. Maybe you make a better girl, Harry.” Bending down, Ginny began to lift up the band on Har’minone underwear when...

121312.content:
Har'mione remained in the Infirmary, as rumours ran around the school. Each more lurid than the last, none of them even close to the truth. Poppy Pomphrey distractedly told her that it was apparently the latest attempt by... he-who-..., others theories involved love potions, and dangerous delusions. The nurse was diligent, and despite the first few days, and the sneaking attempts to find something embarrassing, the true nature of the accident was unknown to the general school population. With curtains blocking the innocent casual observer, and more active defences against the more determined. It meant Har'mione's only visitors were Ron and Hermione herself.

But she was getting bored, and starting to worry about other Hermione'ish changes that she was imagining. The books were becoming more of a distraction, and even a visit to the library felt like an exciting escape. She snorted in disappointment, the library visit was entirely in her own imagination. She wanted to just leave the infirmary, go anywhere.

Her restlessness worsened, as she found more comfort in food, and less exercise meant she quickly piled on the weight. Ron visited as often as possible, and tried to keep her spirits up. There was an accusation in Hermione's eyes, every time the two girls caught each others attention.

The house-elves kept the secret like any loyal retainer, and when Dobby found out about Har'mione's enhanced appetite, he was happy to sneak some snacks in. It even brought Winky out of her shell, a chance to help, another invalid, another prisoner to look after like Master Crouch. Har'mione scuffed her shoes angrily along the stone floor. She missed the freedom, she missed her broom, she hated being confined.

It was about a week later, and Harry knew that he had another week, (at least) in this curvy body. Another week, until Professor Sprout's herbs were sufficiently developed to be brewed into an antidote. Har'mione squirmed her plump arse deeper into the seat, torturing herself with the imagined response of the Potion Master, with the delight that'd light up Professor Snape's face, if they'd had to meet.

Her teeth ground together nervously, a sliver of apple peel working loose. She wasn't sure whether or not he knew, but she had her suspicions.

At least now she wasn't confined to bed anymore, wasn't confined to those .... nighties .... she shuddered at the recollection. Even this... Even wearing the Girls' uniform was at least more clothes. She felt the chaffing of the straps over her shoulders, the constant awareness of her bust. The relentless weight of the girls. The swish of the hem of her skirt a constant reminder, as if the near-constant jiggling that accompanied every step, every shrug, every damned movement served to remind her, that not only was she female, but abundantly so.

She tried to imagine how this was for Hermione, how it'd feel to look at a friend, and see a fun-house reflection looking back at you.

She took a duelling pose. Pointing her wand at the empty air, in salute.

http://orig10.deviantart.net/f652/f/2016...

But, her shoulders collapsed, she wanted a challenge, a real challenge. She needed to take control, to avoid this passivity. The bed springs creaked, as she sat down heavily. The roll of her bust, oddly comforting, now almost familiar. She thought of some simple things to do, some nearby places to visit.

Besides, Dumbledore knew he had an invisibility cloak. He hadn't told her not to... so that's practically the same as allowing her to explore. It certainly felt like consent after staring at the same walls for the week.

Just take a walk with Ron.

Visit the greenhouse, and check on the progress in person.

Visit the kitchens, and thank Dobby and Winky properly in person.

Just stretch her legs, and take a walk. Surely with the Marauder's Map, she could avoid accidental encounters.

Her mischievous side surfaced, now she could visit the Girls Dorm in the Gryffindor Tower.

122.content:
Harry and Ginny were walking hand in hand through the castle gardens. Well, it was the greenhouse really, but they both had good imaginations. Ginny was especially good at Herbology, which she put down to all the time cooking with her mum. But her expertise allowed her a good deal of trust from Professor Sprout. As a Head of House, she had a great deal of freedom and power to exercise it.

Ginny knew which flowers were about to blossom, and had encouraged Harry to come and enjoy them as they bloomed.

The semper-omni berries were also bursting with flavour, and an open-secret as the main ingredient for Bertie Bott's Every Flavour Beans.

They were even stronger when freshly plucked, and the two students fed them to each other. As they took turns, they tried to guess which flavour their partner had just eaten.

After half a dozen, they stopped when Ginny got a Vomit flavoured one. The gagging as she held it down was enough for Harry.

As they left the greenhouse behind, Ginny joked that Harry didn't appreciate quite how awful that last one truly was.

"Well, if you spent some time in my shoes...." Ginny taunted. Her head filling with wicked thoughts as she imagined herself and Harry as one another.

Harry's cheeks coloured as the same thoughts occurred to him.

They passed a noticeboard.

Ginny hummed, and pointed to a parchement pinned there.

Swapping Club.

6pm - 7pm

Tuesday

Main Dungeon

Take a Break from Yourself.

The parchment had a picture of Minerva McGonagall, her arms folded, a stern look on her face. Her usual dour self. Her eyes disapproving, as if she could see who was reading the notice.

"That's when Hermione, Ron and I get together to work on our potions." Harry explained. "We don't want to give Professor Snape the chance to take points from Gryffindor."

"I thought that was Wednesday." Ginny objected.

She hoped Harry didn't press her about how she knew his timetable in such detail.

"Yes, Wednesday."

"But Professor McGonagall would be a great teacher, as an animagus, she has experience of other bodies... at least one... as a cat."

Harry had already told Ginny about his and Ron's experiment with polyjuice. But why was she mentioning Professor McGonagall.

Harry felt a little slow witted, and pointed to the word on the parchment, as he read it.

Swapping Club

6pm - 7pm

Wednesday

Main Dungeon

Take a Break from Yourself.

The spectral image of Professor Binns, forming the main picture. It was barely noticeable that his image was moving. Even now, he looked like he'd make this club monotonous, and dull.

"Ahh." Ginny snapped her fingers as it fell into place. "They want to keep the boys and girls separate."

"Well, it makes sense." nodded Harry, "Although it does take away some of the potential." he added with a smirk.
122.title: Ginny Weasley

choices: Ginny suggests an idea to Harry.

1221.content:
"Can you imagine being in my panties..." Ginny whispered to Harry her cheeks flushing crimson at her forwardness.

"I'd rather imagine you in them..." he answered with smile. His eyes ran over her body, as if she were naked.

However, they both signed up for the Swapping Club. Their signatures separated, and appeared on the relevant form. Harry's appearing beneath the Ghostly image of Professor Binns. While Ginny's appeared beneath the one of the Head of the House.

"It's nice to see the clubs starting up again." He said as he pulled her close to his side.

"Once we have experience with the spell, we'll be able to work it on our own..." Ginny's voice dropped too quiet for Harry to hear, so he leaned in.

"... and I'll be able to feel this from the other side too." Her hands tracing the outline of Harry's member through the fabric of his trousers. The caressing touch, meaning it rather pleasingly responded to her touch. Harry started to stutter and babble. With a single finger across his lips...

"It's a compliment.... I'm taking it as a compliment." She also put an odd emphasis on 'taking' that suggested a whole host of dirty -NO- filthy ideas in Harry's mind.

Trying to regain control of this situation. "I think I'd enjoy duelling, having you at my mercy... Your body petrified... only your eyes darting eagerly back and forth, as you lie defenceless before my ravages."

Beside him, Ginny gave a shudder.... more of a shiver... a frisson of excitement.

He lifted an eyebrow archly to show he was only joking. However, they were both imagining the situation in graphic detail.

"It'll be fun." she added with a smirk.
12211.content:
She squeezed his hand. "I'm a little nervous." she confessed, "Would you meet me before the club... and after. I've a feeling that I'll have a lot to talk about."

"Of course." Harry assured her, patting her delicate hand with his own.

"I would suggest that you not be seen lurking about..."

This was advice that Harry really didn't need. An annoyed Professor McGonagall was a force to be reckoned with... but more usually avoided.

"I'd suggest the Marauder's Map." she lowered her voice when she named it. Harry's brow briefly furrowed, but then he considered who she had for brothers and the concern vanished from his face.

Standing on her tip-toes, Ginny kissed Harry on the cheek, and skipped away.

- - -

Soon it was the Tuesday evening, the last of the classes broke up, and the students were free. Changing into a more casual outfit, Harry headed down to the dungeon, taking a circuitous route. An easy task given the school's natural tendency to change and shift around, Harry was soon overhearing a smattering of conversations from the students that were assembling for the club. He managed to avoid being seen, keeping just around the corner or sufficiently into the shadows to avoid detection. He recognised many of the names, but with a school the size of Hogwarts there were a significant number he didn't know.

There was a close call with a young Slytherin girl, while Harry was scanning the Map for Ginny's arrival. But he made it into cover before being spotted. He had left the cloak back in the dorm room, happy that he wouldn't need it for tonight.

It was only a few minutes to six o'clock, when Ginny's trace appeared on the Dungeon floor. The rest of the students had filed into the class in preparation for the club, an excited buzz clear in their chatter and on their faces.

Ginny arrived with three Gryffindor friends, but sensing Harry's nearness she held back. Feigning an untied shoelace she shooed her friends onwards, allowing Harry to approach and kiss her.

She responded happily, taking his hand as she melted into the moment, when they broke apart Harry found a small phial in his hands.

His eyebrow quirked up with a question.

"Do you trust me?" Ginny asked.

"Do you trust me?" she repeated seeing more questions coming.

With a nod she directed his gaze back to the tiny potion bottle in his hand.

Harry groaned softly, as he felt the polyjuice take effect. His eyeline sinking until he was looking up slightly to meet Ginny's gaze. He wasn't that tall as a boy, and resented losing every inch.

Ginny... Even Ginny was more intimidating now. Her 'Do you trust me?', laden with more menace now. Hugging herself, Harry recognised the softness of her new bust, and started to wonder whose form she'd taken.

With a flick of her new shoulders, and a toss of her hair, she spotted a long flash of straight black hair. Looking up to the ceiling she prayed for strength, and hoped her first guess was wrong.

"Cho.... Cho Chang?" she asked.

She didn't need to wait for an answer, the soft spoken Scottish accent, a marked contrast to Professor McGonagall's harsher brogue, but still unique.

Ginny was practically bouncing with excitement, her hands clapping quietly, as she admired her handiwork, as she admired the perfect imitation of Cho Chang in front of her.

1221111.content:
Harry didn't have any more time to question Ginny, to challenge her. Before she saw a flash of magic strike her. That shade of green was it.... Stupefy. It danced over Ginny like an electric cocoon, before she felt it shock her too. Vivid emerald flashed across her eyes, before a swirling darkness claimed her and she too slumped to the stone floor with a dull, fleshy thump.

Dreams of being tied up, filled Harry's subconscious. Not as terrifying, given how many years, she'd... no... he'd lived under the stairs, with the Dursleys. Her memories were jarring and confused, she knew she was a girl, but she also knew she wasn't. The boyish memories were disconcerting, intimidating. She remembered Harry and Cho, their awkward friendship. They brought back painful memories, sad memories. Though a hint of happiness, came from them being together.

As she swam back to consciousness, she knew she was kneeling. Correcting her balance whenever she threatened toppling too far. A stray squeak came at intervals, both muted, and oddly intimate too.

A groan slipped from her lips, as she opened her eyes. A mirror was placed just in front of her... a torment... a joke... She wasn't sure.

http://68.media.tumblr.com/5a68f67aa73a4...

"Uhhh." she moaned, "Cho... yeah, yeah... I'm Cho Chang." her foggy thoughts marshalling themselves into some semblance of order.

12211111.content:
As she squirmed every slight movement was announced with a squeak. Her latex bondage making subtlety impossible. An answering squeak drew her attention, and with an effort she turned her head just enough to make out the violently angry eyes of a furious Ginny Weasley.

Like a dam breaking, the memories came flooding back. She truly was Harry Potter, and that was her... no, damn it... and that was his girlfriend. He wrenched and heaved, desperate to save her from this humiliation, this ordeal. He at least was used to enforced helplessness, a lifetime at the Dursley's gave her the insight to transcend this.

Another realisation hit him just a moment later. One thing he was sure that Ginny didn't know, one extra barrier she was unaware of.

- - -

An incident from Harry's last trip home. Even with the warnings, even knowing the rules, Harry felt more comfortable when he had his wand near to hand. When the Dursley's were being worse than even their own abysmal normal. Washing the dinner dishes, the pile almost complete, sitting on the draining board. His wand rested on the window sill, with the view across the garden, to the sparrows playing in the pampas grass. He remember whirling round at the creak of the kitchen floorboard, to see Dudley, scissors in hand ready to take a thick chunk of Harry's wild hair.

Still a pace or so away, he froze scissor hand already outstretched. Harry's breath flaring his nostrils. He didn't make the most intimidating sight. Though hopefully enough to make Dudley think twice. Hell, enough to make him stop.

Aware of the law, he focused his attention, summoning magic. Just to make his wand tip glisten, not enough to cast a spell, not enough to trigger a howler from the ministry.

Harry's eyes narrowed, soapy water dripping from his rubber gloves. He had to convince Dudley he was about to regain his piggy little tail. Stubbornly Harry's wand refused to even light. The wand felt odd, unresponsive in his grip. Adjusting his grip, it still felt wrong, like it wasn't a wand, that this was simply a dead piece of wood, with no life, no magic, nothing. The chill in his veins flooded every part of him, and a shudder raced down his spine. He gritted his teeth, snarling at him, until Dudley shrieked and ran.

Harry drew the wand closer, looking for damage, for some reason his wand hadn't worked. Was this a pre-emptive punishment, was the ministry intervening before he inflated a family member, or levitated another cake...

Hands trembling uncontrollably he only just managed to put it back on the sill. A faint hollow rattling as the wand came to rest. It had never felt more like an impotent, little stick.

Fighting back the tears he felt in the corner of his eyes, he finished the dishes and fled back to his room. Once the bedroom door was shut behind him, he slumped to the floor, his back resting against the cheap pine. Hope was hard to find, but with some experimentation, he found his wand was still working. He found also that it was the damned rubber gloves that were the problem. A quiet conversation with Hermione confirmed his suspicions. That the unnatural material, it's inherent muggle nature meant it interfered with magic. Much like trying to get a mobile phone to work at Hogwarts. Or the need for Rita Skeeter to be an animagus, rather than plant an electronic bug.

- - -

In short, with them both bound head to toe in latex, especially their hands in latex gloves, they might as well be muggles. Even with wands, they'd be powerless as muggles.

"It's poly...."

"Mmm hmm." Ginny confirmed with a smile.

"Who... whose hair..." he managed to stammer out.

"Don't worry, my sweet. I wouldn't make you an ugly girl." she stroked Harry's chin reassuringly.

"That wasn't what I meant... That wasn't what I was saying..."

With a groan, "No. No. Of course not." he admitted, "But Professor McGonagall will know... she'll be able to tell..." Harry's voice sped up as he changed tack.

"Oh... You don't trust me?" her lip started to quiver. Harry was sure it was an act, but his head danced as he weighed up his options.

With an exasperated gasp, he flipped the top off the tiny bottle.

He looked from the unstoppered bottle, back up to Ginny's now ecstatic face, as she nodded eagerly.

"Cheers."

He poured it into his mouth in a swift gesture. It smelled faintly of strawberries, and tasted incredibly sweetly, of Summer berries, and fruit.

In an instant, as he felt the magic go to work, Ginny's hand came up and covered his eyes. She backed him against a wall, still blocking his sight. Harry felt the magic going to work. His ass expanded pressing more firmly against the wall, and over a larger area. Other parts felt like they were deflating and withering away. Her arms thinned, and she felt the cuffs brush over her fingers. There was a swelling as she felt her breasts come into place. Their unfamiliar weight pulling at her shoulders. The wall scrapped over her ass, as her legs lost a few inches, and she shrank downwards.

"Is it done?" she asked uncertainly. Her voice now softer, sweeter, and undeniably girlish.

It was all the answer she needed. "Don't worry about Minerva either... I gave her a version of the Confundus charm... She won't be too nosy."

Ginny pulled away one hand, kissing Harry on her petite nose, before taking out a handy little mirror, as Harry caught her reflection as a hand mirror showed her the new face she wore.

"Girls don't do that." Ginny snapped, as she watched Harry pulling and plucking at her uniform. The boys Gryffindor uniform not fitting her for a number of reasons. However, the disapproval, as the slender fingers tried to tug the uniform into proper alignment. A task entirely beyond the possible.

Vestiti Femininio

Ginny tapped the new girl on the nose, and watched the uniform shifted to fit Roberta Ravenclaw. She was the Great, great, great ...etc... Grand-daughter of one of the school's founders. Harry's jumper shifted, taking on a more generous shape. It was unsettling to watch as his trousers merged, becoming a long skirt. Which in it's turn retreated up her legs... Far too far in her opinion.

She failed to stop her startled gasp, as she felt something new.

It was her first bra forming. It lifted the girls, cradling and supporting them.

Ginny had to slap away Roberta's hands as she reached for her bosom, and shoulders. Trying impotently to make it fit without pulling unnecessarily. It was a fruitless task, even as Roberta's mouth quirked to the side in submission to the inevitable.

The smile on Ginny's face, suggested that she knew Roberta name was rather different among half of the students. For the boys she was 'Busty Berta'.

With a silent spell and a flick of her wand. The door closed behind them, and the heavy lock clicked as the key turned.

12211311.content:
Her eyes swept over the room, as she estimated how many pupils were in the room.

"Let's make this interesting. Twenty points for the girl who first successfully performs the spell."

The Slytherin girls immediately went into a huddle, casting malicious glances at the other girls as they clustered into house groups. There were four Slytherins, four Gryffindors, two Hufflepuff, and six Ravenclaws (including Roberta).

Roberta felt a hand on her arm drawing her away from Ginny. She didn't want to go... But didn't want to attract undue attention to herself.

The Ravenclaws agreed to work together, and were eager to win the points. Roberta felt a little side-lined, as the others largely ignored her when she agreed, and disagreed. Nothing nasty was said, but ....

She cast a glance over her shoulder to see Ginny deep in conversation with her three friends. Noticing the look, she sent a sly wink in Roberta's direction.

Professor McGonagall slowly went through the wand movements. She refused to share the incantation until she was satisfied that everyone was sufficiently good enough to continue.

Looking around Roberta was sure everyone was a fifth year or older. It settled her nerves, presumably an incantation on the poster.

Deliberately she placed her wand down, and went over the pronunciation of the incantation.

Verto Permuto.

Soon everyone was chanting it in time. Working to synchronise their breathing... their timing... their emphasis.

Perhaps it was the unfamiliar clothes... or the distraction of wearing satin and silk. But you found your breathing to be ... distracting. You didn't expect to be so aware of your breasts. The merest shift of your shoulders, the simplest of brush of the fabric as your nipples moved was a source of ... -er- ... loss of focus.

"All right. Now, girls I want you to pick a partner. And focus your attention on them... Ignore everyone else..."

The two Slytherin pairs were instantly casting the spell. Their wand flicks just a little too eager, and their chants just a little too angry. There were slightly pained gasps from each girl whenever the magic failed.

Without a word being said you pair up with Maria Glossop. You know her name, and that's about it. Despite the decision being made silently, you still feel you were last to be selected... and least desired in more ways than one.

Verto Permuto

Your wand a little uneven in the swoosh. But you still feel a vague pull... As if you leaned forwards a few inches... As if the world ... no ... As if Maria jumped closer.

But the sensation vanishes, and is replaced by a clenching pain in your chest. Powerless to resist, you clench your fist, and slam it into your chest instinctively. There's a brief answering ripple as your tits shift in response to the blow. There's an equally pained look on Maria's face. Although, you see her gaze is fixed rather lower than your face.

It takes a moment to work out Maria's expression. But... But... it's reluctance... She doesn't really want the spell to work, and if you're right. She's not envious of your body, she doesn't want to have... (you can't believe it), she doesn't want to have your incredible tits. Looking down, you try to appreciate them from a female perspective. But it's hard to dislike the girls. They are so full, so pert... so perfect.

You hear the incantation being repeated all around you. In various tones, and at various paces, while Professor McGonagall wander around the room. Whenever a girl glances in her direction, the look is brief, and discouraged with a silent scowl.

Verto Permuto

This time, you feel the pull coming from elsewhere... Your face snaps around, and you take in Maria... She almost managed the spell. You can see the frustration on her face. The Ravenclaw desire... need to be first ... to be best. At their worst Ravenclaws could be just as selfish, as driven as Slytherins. Harry remembered that confession, that Cho had shared under the moonlight.

His thoughts were drawn to Maria. He looked her over as a guy... and as a girl.... she assessed her as a rival... as competition.

Maria was about the same height as Roberta... With longer, silkier hair, and an enchanting innocent look to her face. Taking in her body, Harry saw that she wasn't as 'endowed' as Roberta... None of the girls were...

Although, she had curves. Maria had a deliciously waspish waist, her bust swelling, and her hips wide and fertile. Roberta felt a degree of jealousy, as she looked a lot more ... more balanced.

122113112.content:

Her current attire didn't come off no matter how much Harry recited the whole gamut of Vestiti spells. so that left two options: Let the Polyjuice wear off, or take the second dose.

The pros and cons were evident from the start. Revert back to Harry, and have students laughing behind his back for months to come, and have pictures handed around by Slytherin students in the Great Hall? Or have Roberta become a laughingstock for a week or two? It wasn't even the most offensive outfit she had worn — a smattering of pink coated Harry's cheeks as she remembered her Yule ball outfit from a few years back.

Her decision made, Harry set her face in a stern expression. Picking up the bottle — Harry learned that bending at the waist was something witches only did for show and certainly not comfort, especially one as... blessed as Roberta — Harry set her face in a stern expression and downed the remainder of it.

The familiar sweet taste filled Harry's mouth — but there was no enjoying it this time. Harry could swear that her breasts and rear gave a sharp jolt on the ingestion of the potion, reasserting themselves, but she couldn't be sure.

What she could be sure of was a small sense of static in her head. She had noticed it a bit while in class, but it was certainly more prominent now. Roberta didn't have her 'reputation' simply for being nice to look at. She was poor at general spellwork, an amateur at Potions, and Magical History was right out the window. She scratched by on general Poors and the occasional Acceptable on her O.W.L.s, but her baseline laid more around Dreadfuls, if you asked her fellow Ravenclaws. Harry exercised a bit of her Legilimens skill internally, probing the recesses of her mind. To her relief, there were no memories of Roberta's escapades, except for the accounts heard secondhand, and some (luckily, some whispered) seen firsthand.

But the uncomfortable fuzz still remained. Harry tried a few charms, but the results were worrying. Lumos only sputtered at the end of her wand, only managing a full light when remembering to flick the wand instead of merely jabbing. Accio worked as well as it did before — but focusing on the school bag required a mite more brainpower than she was used to. Things just came a little slower, but the fact that Harry

Harry chalked it mostly up to stress, and walked on to her next destination, more than a flicker of doubt plaguing her.

"That's it." Ginny said with a grin. "That's a perfect Pansy expression." she was almost giggling with glee.

Vestiti Feminini

Harry's uniform shifted, the touches of red and gold unstitching themselves. As the changes rippled his uniform stopped fitting so badly. It transfigured into a girls' uniform... The traces now were emerald and silver. A serpent on his breast. A hand brushing over the stitching confirming it wasn't an illusion. The sensation from her chest, confirming too, she had breasts.

"Ginny." Harry said in barely suppressed rage.

"Pansy." Ginny answered lightly.

Harry couldn't keep angry at that gleeful face, it's impish grin. She was just too delighted with her joke. A touch too much of Fred and George in her make-up. Besides, he was still adjusting to his new uniform.

Her hands were unsure where to reach, scratch, explore. It was a rush of alien sensations. She felt the extra heft to her rump. But more distracting was the sensation of the thong disappearing between those plump ass cheeks. Was there a womanly way, to pluck it back out?

The length of her skirt was another distraction. Constantly brushing across smooth, supple thighs. It was too high for his.. her comfort. Her fingers ached to pull it lower. Common sense fought that instinct, it just wouldn't extend simply by pulling at it.

She was also intensely too aware of her bust. It felt massive, tugging at her shoulders. The straps digging in. The band around her chest a constantly uncomfortable reminder of her new sex.

Ginny smacked at her hands, every few seconds. "Girls don't do that!", she hissed time and again to stop the newest Slytherin witch destroying the disguise. Harry just couldn't fight those instincts, and didn't care to preserve Pansy's reputation.

Ragazza Completa

Harry didn't have time to object before the spell hit her. Instantly the sense of discomfort and wrongness vanished. Her fidgeting fingers fell to her side.

Taking control, she brushed imaginary crumbs from her skirt. Before standing up straight. She was still aware of all the feminine aspects to her body. But, now, they felt like something she chose. A price to be paid, or just right.

It was only worrying in how calm she now felt, calm and comfortable in this body.

"You're sure the real Pansy, isn't coming?" she asked Ginny.

"Even better, you'll be the only Slytherin there." She patted Harry slender hand. "Now, let's put some distance between us." Ginny advised.

Giving Harry/Pansy a pat on the bottom to send her on her way.

"You pure bloods, don't hang about with us blood traitors, or those with muddy origins." Ginny's words chased after Pansy, as she settled from the skittish half run, back to a more normal walking pace.

There was a wrongness to that touch. 'A girl shouldn't pat another girl on the ass, like that!' She thought without criticism.

Pansy found herself walking to the Swapping Club, with a proud strut. Shoulders back, chest thrust out, and bounce in her step. Head held high, she was the embodiment of haughty disdain.

It also meant she found herself alone, without anyone to chat to in the club. There was a brief look from Professor McGonagall, Harry was sure that he'd been discovered. But, when the teacher thought she wasn't looking Pansy caught the suspicious look, she spared for Slytherins she didn't like. It was enough to boost her confidence.

Ginny was the last student to arrive, just at the clock struck six. Professor McGonagall looked down the empty corridor for any dawdling students before shutting and locking the door.

Harry was a little surprised when Ginny wanted to join Harry. He half suspected she was curious about observing her brother, it was a rather odd family, and Ginny was rather competitive. She had the adventurous nature of Fred and George, and the intelligence of Hermione Granger, if not the dedication to study.

Ron sat beside him, taking notes and showing an enthusiasm that made Harry look twice.

He went over the spell, 'Verto Permuto', and the necessary wand movements, until he was sure they'd both mastered the spell sufficiently.

1221322.content:
The two stood a few paces apart, wands drawn, and from their expressions looked as if they were about to duel. Neville Longbottom, as ever projected an odd sense of uncertainty, mixed with a vague air of not quite incompetence.

Opposite him, Zacharias Smith looked ill at the possibility of swapping with Neville. Only Ravenclaw pride kept him there, and ready to show he could cast the spell better than Neville.

Harry and Ron exchanged a tight nod, both willing Neville to get the spell right, first time.

Verto Permuto.

Only Neville's wand lit with magic, despite the incantation, and the gestures Zach's wand didn't light up. The spell failed. Professor Binns floated between the two students before a second attempt could be made.

"Here we see the difficulty of the spell." Professor Binns explained. "We need both casters to be done well, and at the same time, for the swap to happen."

Zacharias' cheeks burned with shame and anger, as the professor talked. Drifting backwards from the pair and back through his lectern, he gestured for them to try again.

Verto Permuto.

This time both wands lit with eldritch magic. The light shooting from the wand tips, instead of crashing together. They danced in a tight sphere of magic between the pair, before continuing on to land on the opposite wand. Both students gave a stiff shudder, and stepped back uncertainly. Raising a hand to their heads, the wide eyed look on both their faces telling everyone present the spell had worked.

"It worked... It worked, Harry." Zacharias' tone was pure Neville Longbottom, sounding surprised at his own success. While opposite, Neville's body looked concerned, and glanced towards some fellow Ravenclaw students for support.

"Well done! Well Done!" Professor Binns looked the most animated he'd ever been seen. "Twenty points to Ravenclaw and Gryffindor."

Harry smiled back at Neville, and Ron added a weak smile in support too.

"Okay, now swap back."

Zacharias already had his wand drawn and was ready to repeat the spell.

"Reversal is the exact same spell as for the initial swap..." the professor said, "and can only be used to restore the parties."

Neville was immediately nervous about repeating the spell, and the possibility of getting it wrong, but...

Verto Permuto.

The spell restored them to their original bodies, as professor Binns invited the club members to experiment in pairs.

12213221.content:
The beaming smile of the overjoyed Neville was impossible to break, as he strutted back towards the cluster of Gryffindor students. With Zach heading back to his house group. Both were eager to share the experience, and any personal insights.

His best advice was concentrate on the wand movements, and allow your mind to handle saying the spell without concentrating too much. Slytherin and Hufflepuff were already breaking into pairs, and Ron gestured for Harry to follow him to an empty space.

However, Harry didn't respond. He was no longer looking his direction, instead seeing Harry being led the opposite way by a smirking Neville. There was a confused/amused expression on his face, and Ron turned to see Lee Jordan looking nervous about eager.

Dismissing his best friend, he went to the free space with Lee. Inside, he was a little upset, assuming Harry was being kind to Neville. But he needed to concentrate on his end of the spell. Facing off against Lee, they both silently practised the incantation, and the wand moves until they felt they were synchronised. It was all far more complicated than a simple swish and flick.

A flash of light, and an excited gabble of voices, told everyone in the room that a swap had occurred. The diligent Hufflepuffs being the first to manage the spell without direct supervision.

- - - - -

Harry looked nervously back at Neville, the whispered words still bouncing around the inside of his head. He could barely believe it. Ginny had the perfect impersonation of Neville, not merely the voice, but the mannerisms, and his bearing too.

The thought that soon he'd be in that body, made him unsure how to feel. He saw Neville/Ginny's lips move as she silently mouthed the spell. Meeting her eyes, he saw a twinkle of mischief that was pure Weasley, as she was ready to attempt the swap for real.

Harry saw the hesitation, as Ginny dismissed giving Harry a kiss. The excitement making her want to embrace the situation, but it'd be hard to explain as Neville.

Sharing a nod of the head, The pair cast the spell.

Verto Permuto

Harry was startled as it worked the first time. He only had a moment to think that, as his body felt unsteady, as if he were being pulled backwards. The classroom retreated into the dark, as if he were falling down a bottomless well.

As the tiny circle of light vanished, it snapped back causing him to recoil on his heels. Harry was looking at himself, a startled Ginny smirking with his face, his hands exploring the body. Oddly, Ginny checked for the lack of bust, and the reduced male rump, before recalling she was meant to be Neville.

Automatically, Harry was copying those same gestures. As he checked for a bust before stopping himself.

"It worked..." Harry exclaimed.

"Again..." Neville agreed.

The urge to hug was hard to resist, as their eyes met. But taking in both their bodies, quickly passed. Behind them a flash announced, the successful swap of Lee and Ron.

A few scattered chants around the room were mostly met with groans of frustration. Seeing the two swapped Gryffindor pairs, they were soon swamped with those seeking more advice, and suggestions.

1221322121.content:
Once the three friends were in a quiet corridor, Neville attacked, driving Ron backwards into an alcove. A fist knotted in his shirt he held Ron against the stone wall.

"That's not Ron." he snarled to justify his anger. Turning back to the smirking Ron. "How did you know that?" he spat the words angrily in Ron's face.

It was clear to all three, that Ron was more casual about this attack than normal. Neville wasn't the scariest of students at the best of time, but rage contorted his features.

Neville's level of intimidation dropped radically, as a look of queasiness crossed his face. Fighting the urge to throw up, his skin started to ripple. His face rolling like boiling water, even his grip bubbled as it was knotted at Ron's neck.

But as the polyjuice wore off, Neville's eyeline dropped, and he felt the strength wane from his body. Too soon, Ginny stood in the oversized clothes of Neville Longbottom, with her tiny fist knotted in her brother's shirt.

A shimmering half-reflection in the window's glass revealed her new body to Ron. Releasing her brother, she explored herself, quickly discovering things were as bad as she feared. Her cheeks burning more crimson with every passing second.

"Well, Ginny... How does it feel being the littlest?" She asked from Ron's body.

"Does this explain how I knew?" he asked, gesturing between their two bodies.

From her new body, Ron was letting her longer hair flow through her hands. Fascinated, hypnotised, and unsettled by it's length.

Harry burst out laughing, gales of laughter echoing from the stone walls, as the two siblings faced off against each other.

Ginny drew her wand.

Vestiti Feminini

Ron squeaked as the bolt of white magic shot towards her. In moments, the clothes were no longer smothering her, as the shirt pulled tight, and changed subtly to become a blouse. The legs of trousers retreated up from the dusty floor, changing form as it rose. Gaining pleats, and losing the legs it was a knee length skirt, as Ron tried to tug it lower.

A gasp burst from her lips, and she straightened up with a horrified look on her face. Hands going to her chest, she was mortified as she felt a bra from. The too tight item made her new gender more obvious to herself, and impossible for Harry to ignore. From her new body Ginny beamed, and gave something like a gruff giggle.

Snatching her hands back, Ron held them at her side, knotting into tiny futile fists. She looked to Harry for support.

Harry fought down his humour, and with an effort added, "That's enough Ginny.... It's time to swap back."

He could barely keep a straight face with the memory of Ron's almost giggle. But that was made worse by her pout, and reluctant nod.

Drawing their wands, the two faced off, as they had in the club. Wands posed to perform the gestures. Harry stepped back, to avoid any accidents.

Verto Permuto.

Both wands lit with a brilliant glow, shooting forward. Instead of forming a boiling knot of magic, they simply ricocheted off each other, and shot back to their caster.

"Again." Ron squeaked from Ginny's body. The fear in her voice was clear, the spell hadn't failed... They'd all seen how the spell failed in front of Professor Binns.

"Again!" Ron demanded, sounding like she was about to stamp her foot.

Ginny drew her wand into the starting position, and they recast the spell.

Verto Permuto.

Once again the magic ricocheted, and they stayed in the same bodies.

"We should just swap back..." Ron was almost wailing from despair.

Harry looked on with bemusement, nothing to add.

Ginny looked pensive for a moment, weighing up what to say, before deciding to talk.

"You swapped with Neville, not Ginny, so.... until Neville and Ron switch back, we can't...." she trailed off, as the realisation hit the two boys. Professor Binns' words echoed in their minds as they knew it was true.

"You do have more polyjuice, don't you?" Ron squeaked, already imagining, dreading having to live as his sister. Even Ron was blushing, imagining having to share a dorm with her boyfriend.

"It takes months to brew...." Ron was on the verge of tears. "Please tell me you do..."

123.content:
Harry looked out from behind Luna's eyes, as he gazed up at Hogwarts castle.

It was a week before the school re-opened. The wizarding world coming together to rebuilt it after the destruction of the battle of Hogwarts. Now in his early twenties Harry was ready to see the old place again. The painful memories now somewhat softened, and the happy ones renewed.

The castle threw open it's doors for everyone. A celebration, a week long extravaganza to bring people together heel old wounds and tell old stories.

On hearing that Luna wasn't coming, he'd decided to visit the castle in disguise. They'd exchanged owls, as he'd tried to convince her to come. Another friendly face would always be welcome, and he wanted her there for himself and for her too. But her answer was resolute, she wasn't coming. She just didn't feel up to the attention, the memories for her weren't entirely pleasant and she wanted to move on. Harry understood, and sadly accepted. He certainly knew what she meant.

The public attention after his first vanquishing of Lord Voldemort was still to annoying to bear all day. He knew that his attendance was necessary, and he'd have to attend the Grand Hall, and the feast as himself. But Harry wanted to enjoy himself, to have some peace for quiet exploration. To visit the kitchens, to talk to the ghosts, to the portraits, offer them his thanks.

Luna had felt like the perfect choice for a disguise, the airy blonde was known for being other worldly and any missteps could just be ignored as Luna being Luna. Her replies clearly joyous, as Harry suggested his plan. Confiding in her, his desire for a disguise, and her as the person to provide it.

It was the very next owl that Harry received, that came with a curl of blonde hair.

- - - - -

Returning his gaze from the window to his room in Hogsmeade, Harry double-checked his supply of polyjuice. Enough vials for him to maintain the disguise for almost the entire week. His pocket enchanted to be as big inside as the Weasley tent, or Hermione's handbag.
Taking a deep breath, he steadied his nerves. His attendance would be necessary, his arrival an event. The stairs creaked as Harry descended. The idea once inside, he could swallow the polyjuice and have the freedom of anonymity.

A bag hanging from his shoulder slapped against his thigh as he walked. The invisibility cloak, and Marauder's Map inside it.

Luna's taste in clothes was as carefree as every other thing that affected her. In short, Harry felt incredibly on display, as she emerged from the shadows of the alcove. Her new centre of balance, took her a little time to adjust, as she walked out into the surrounding fields. The path leading down to Hagrid's hut and the Forbidden Forest.

It didn't take her too long to get used to not striding around with huge steps, and move with a more elegant glide.

https://78.media.tumblr.com/99b8303e6553...

The whole carefree attitude was beyond him, with every step, every jiggle reminding him of his new gender. Hell, even those wider hips seemed to sway on their own. His rump feeling as if it had a life of it's own... it's own inertia.

Now understanding soul-deep, how women worried about having a big ass.

Taking a deep breath, she tried to calm herself and turned back to the door to the castle. He spotted the person standing in the half-shadow of the doorway. A curious look on their face as they tried to work out what was going on.

124.content:
Harry looked down at the locket that he'd received from Cho. It had been too painful a memory for a long time, that he'd put it at the bottom of his trunk.

Even finding it now, brought back the loss of Cedric, and the end of his friendship with Cho. Opening the locket, he saw her smiling face, and on the opposite side a cutting of her hair.

It was serendipity, he was preparing to experiment with a new version of polyjuice potion. It had fewer exotic ingredients, and didn't need to brew for as long. He'd even been allowed to leave it to stew overnight.

Just one night, he was going to be so happy to show it to Hermione. She thought that it would still take over a week to make polyjuice potion. Harry did respect her skills as a witch. But... he did think she was overly fond of the text books, and lacked the insight... or intuition to mix the things that just ...well... just felt right.

Harry fished the key from the bottom of his trunk. That's what he'd been searching for when the locket was discovered.

This would allow him a little anonymity, besides there might be side effects that he didn't want to risk embarrassing himself with a failed potion. There was a very real possibility that the potion would do nothing... or make him throw up... or not work quite right.

But it ... it felt right. Harry was sure that this blend would be more powerful, faster, stronger... better!

He clenched his fist around the key and locket with determination, sweeping his bag up as he left the dormitory. There were several students that greeted him as he made his way through the school. He didn't notice all of them.

The bag contained clothes. Women's clothing, the thought that soon he'd be wearing it... and filling it out rather well made Harry feel a range of conflicting emotions. He wasn't sure of the size he'd be afterwards, so had made the uniform self-adjusting. That was one thing that he was particularly happy about. Cho wasn't overly endowed with curves, either busty or bootylicious. She had incredible legs, and loved to show them off in the shortest of skirts when relaxing.

He tried to distract himself, by thinking of all the times he'd been forced to accept Dudley's ill-fitting hand-me-downs.

Harry reached the class sooner than he planned, one of the advantages of not paying attention to your surroundings. He slipped inside the class and opened up the locked cupboard.

The small cauldron was bubbling away quite happily, and as Harry sniffed the rising fumes. It smelt ... promising. He gave it a stir, and the contents sloshed slowly around, almost like gel.

Harry took the hair from the locket and thought back over his preparatory work. He'd left a note on Ron's bed, for him to come and check up on Harry. That was his safety net. Ron and Hermione were at Hogsmeade just now, and would be back in a few hours towards the end of the day.

If everything went well, he could return to the common room and destroy the note as unneeded.

If something humiliating happened, there should hopefully be time for the effects to vanish, allowing him to keep a modicum of dignity.

However, as this was entirely untested....

The note was just a precaution he told himself....

He dropped the hairs into the cauldron. The mix changed from emerald green, taking on an azure blue colour. As it did, it let off a slowly pulsing light.

While the potion was changing colour, Harry stripped off his clothes.

With a gasp he realised the classroom door was unlocked. He darted over, and slid the bolt into place.

With a grunt, he walked back to the pile of clothes and his bag of women's clothing. They looked a lot more feminine as he held them up, the magic allowed them to fit his scrawny male body. They were almost luminous pink, in the light of the class, and he felt the need to hurry the experiment along to it's natural conclusion.

Looking in, he was happy to see the potion was not shimmering or pulsing any longer. It was a deep azure, with only the merest of sparkles to indicate it's magical power.

Dipping a glass phial into the mix, the liquid flowed into the container. It was slow and deliberate as it entered the tiny bottle.

Once Harry was satisfied he had enough to work with, he raised it in silent salute and swallowed it before he could lose his nerve.

Instantly his fingers spasmed. He nearly crushed the tiny phial, instead it fell to the floor and shattered. Seconds later, Harry's shoulders pulled in closer, losing their masculine width. As he watched, his arms lost what little muscle he had built up, becoming slender... then positively skinny and weak.

He ran his hands down the arms and over his exposed tummy. The simple brushing of his fingers dislodged what hair there was. Running his hands wider, he didn't want to think of -that-, he felt a widening of his hips. That was new. He bent to allow himself to run his hands over his legs.... HER legs... again the simple caress of his fingers was enough for all the hairs to fall out.

She scissored her legs back and forth enjoying the smooth thighs brushing against each other.

Harry turned his attention to his face. It didn't help... he wasn't sure how his face felt or... if it was different... If he now looked like Cho Chang... He wasn't sure, but her nose might be smaller ... and her lips might be fuller.

He would have punched the air. The change was rapid and painfree, and as best he could tell successful.

Then things started to go wrong.

Harry felt a heat build up beneath his nipples. Already the were wider and more sensitive... But now they were almost impossibly responsive. The air was chilly in a way that made 'The Boy who survived' very aware of her new sex.

She felt a burst of pain, and a girlish grunt escaped her lips. The pain increased, growing and growing.

Harry tried to massage the pain away. The touch of her fingers was interesting... very interesting, and did distract her from the pain. However, there was something else that was becoming more of a concern.

The potion had a side-effect. A very obvious side-effect.

Harry's bust was swelling well beyond that of Cho's modest dimensions. They rose passed Pansy Parkinson's more generous bust... and soon eclipsed even Betsy Jones, the blushing Hufflepuff.

Harry really, really hoped that Cho never found out about this porn star version of her body. Even now the girls weren't slowing their growth. They were not to be outdone by the swelling of her nipples either. Their shape was clearly outlined by the straining fabric.

124221.content:
"For pity sake Harry, don't you know how dangerous magical experiments can be?"

Hermione's tone was exasperated, and a little afraid.

"I won't pretend to understand what you were hoping to achieve." she continued.

"It was meant to be Cho Chang's hair... I just wanted to make a longer lasting polyjuice potion." she muttered, her voice barely audible as she sullenly informed Hermione of her goal.

"And if you'd succeeded, but you found your new form wasn't magical, you could be trapped as a muggle girl."

She stopped.

"You do still... You can still work magic, can't you Harry?" she asked a cold dread in her voice.

Harry picked up his wand, it was serving as a book mark at the moment.

"Wingardium Leviosa."

With a swish and a flick, the notebook, lifted off the floor.

Harry grimaced at the sound of her voice, it was upsetting inside her head it still sounded the same. But aloud was a different matter.

Hermione was relieved, and missed the look on Harry's face.

"Vestiti Studenti." Ron spoke the incantation clearly, and tapped himself in the chest with his own wand. Thankfully he too wasn't reduced to mugglehood.

She watched as Ron's shirt pulled itself back together, the buttons flying up to re-attach themselves, and the rips invisibly mending. As the magic progressed, his jumper started to weave itself back together. The wool knitting itself back into the familiar food-stained jumper that marked him as Ron Weasley. She loved his scruffy nature, it was something she just wasn't capable of. She was diligent and hyper-organised. She sometimes envied his more laid-back approach to life.

Satisfied that Ron was okay, she turned back towards Harry. She was as over-endowed as ever, and 'Mione just shook her head slowly in disappointment.

"There are other dangers too." she told them.

"Did you even see Ron drink any potion... It might have been the tiniest droplet, or she ... sorry ... he inhaled too strong a wisp of vapour. Heck, even now you might be extending the potion's effect just breathing in the air."

She stopped for a breath herself.

The boys, well, Ron and Harry looked at the little cauldron. It's contents -glooping- and -burbling- away like a colourful pool of heated mud. They looked a little worried as the mix gave a sound like a fart, and released a small pink cloud. The cloud rose a couple of feet and dissipated into nothing.

Ron edged back, just a little.

"That's just the dangers to yourself. Imagine if you'd spilled some into the water supply. We'd have a school full of Cho Changs, or ... or worse...."

Mutely she gestured to Harry's hyper inflated chest.

"You know that Beauxbatons wasn't always a female-only school."

Harry and Ron exchanged blank looks, before their minds drifted off towards their memories of the students and the Tri-wizard tournament, and those lovely girls.

"A-hem." she coughed, "You do know that was where Dumbledore met Nicholas Flamel."

1251.content:
Harry and Ron were working together on their final year project. An alternative to Polyjuice. Hermione had reworked the ingredients, based upon a break-through that came to Harry in a dream.

Professor McGonagall had finally granted them approval to proceed, having satisfied herself that whether or not it worked, it was at least safe. The whole idea was so revolutionary that she'd allowed them to work together on what was usually an individual project.

A skinsuit had been investigated by many great minds down the centuries, so the Professor wasn't holding up too much hope. It was all meant to be a learning process, and she felt certain that Harry would be diligent and precise. She never liked to dismiss any pupil, but when she looked at Ron, and his brothers, she always had to restrain a muttered groan of despair.

The boys had still tried to inject a little fun into their work, and decided to become the Patil sisters.

Minerva had ensured that the girls gave their consent, and to ensure the boys were entirely honest and transparent she stood in for the entire conversation. Harry blushing and looking at the floor, while Ron stuttered and smirked.

The sisters made them repeat exactly what they were trying to achieve, and probed them about their motives. Until the boys were ready to run away from embarrassment, then, then the girls gave their consent with a giggle.

Each sister handed over a few strands of hair, and before they could snatch it and flee.

Padma told Harry that long hair needed a lot of care and brushing, and how long it took to wash.

He did manage to get out a 'Thank you.', which prompted Ron to give Parvati his thanks.

- - - - -

It felt like a long time ago, although it was only a week. Professor McGonagall had them in the infirmary. She'd even ejected Madame Pomfrey from the area.

Hermione had invited herself, and given that she was their friend, the teacher allowed it.

The two students added the final ingredients into the cauldrons, and with a -huff- a cloud of white smoke rose from each one.

Ron and Harry exchanged worried, hopeful glances.

Minerva and Hermione exchanged worried, amused looks.

"Oh, an hour.", she cast a look sideways to Ron. "Though, even achieving a transformation is a significant achievement."

The professor, dipped her wand into the cauldron. Her lips moving silently as she did.

On contact, the tip of her wand glowed, an angry red, that rose from the tip, heading towards her hand. A rare smile, on her face, leaving the students a little surprised, and concerned.

Her face took on a more distant expression, looking beyond the students, unbound even by the walls of the room, "Oh... it's well over an hour." she said in a pleasantly surprised tone.
